title: Simon Jabesq

'''Simon Jabesq''' was a [[Chief/Legends|chief]]<ref name="Complete Visual">''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] for<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]]<ref name="VD">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> [[Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps/Legends|Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Around that [[Time/Legends|time]], Jabesq worked in the [[Theed Hangar/Legends|hangar]] of Naboo's [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]], wearing a [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] that bore<ref name="VD" /> the engineer's first name<ref name="Note">{{CSWECite|I|299|Futhork}} establishes a transliteration table for the [[Futhork/Legends|Futhork]] [[Writing/Legends|alphabet]], and the characters on Jabesq's [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] in [[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary|''Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary'']] can be translated as reading "Simon"—Jabesq's first name, as established by {{CSWECite|II|131|Jabesq, Simon}}—from referencing the aforementioned table.</ref> in the [[Futhork/Legends|Futhork]] [[Writing/Legends|alphabet]]. Jabesq's surname was shared with<ref name="VD" /> [[Bernie Jabesq]], another Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps member active around the same period.<ref name="EVD">''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Jabesq_helmet.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Simon Jabesq's helmet from ''Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary'']]
The character Jabesq was created for [[1999]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary|''Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary'']], written by [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]]. Although the caption accompanying Jabesq's helmet in the reference book states that "Jabesq" is the name written on the headgear,<ref name="VD" /> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' established a transliteration table of the Futhork alphabet<ref name="CSWE Futhork">{{CSWECite|I|299|Futhork}}</ref> with which the writing on the helmet can be deciphered as "Simon."<ref name="Note" /> The same source also established "Simon" as Jabesq's first name.<ref name="CSWE" /> The [[2012]] reference title ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' reprinted the caption from ''Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary'' with a correction to reflect Jabesq's full name.<ref name="EVD" />
